farmer.name: Mina
lines: Watered crops grow with a little extra courage.
Strawberries are gentle, but pumpkins like to take their time.

time_lines.morning: Morning is the best time to water.
time_lines.afternoon: The afternoon sun is kind to the crops.
time_lines.evening: I'm about to head in for the evening.
time_lines.night: So sleepy... the fields can wait till dawn.

fisher.name: Finn
fisher.greeting: The river is calm. Good fishing weather.
lines: Some fish bite quickly, and some make you wait.
Try a pond when you want something unusual.

time_lines.morning: Fish bite best in the early light.
time_lines.afternoon: Midday catches are slow but steady.
time_lines.evening: Evening ripples mean one last cast.
time_lines.night: Even the river is asleep now.

shopkeeper.name: Poppy
shopkeeper.greeting: Welcome in. I kept the seed shelf tidy for you.
lines: A full bag of seeds is the start of a good morning.
Bring crops back any time if you want to sell them.

time_lines.evening: Closing soon, grab what you need.
time_lines.night: We're shut for the night, sorry!

villager.name: Nori
villager.greeting: I hope your pet is having a cozy day.
lines: The village feels warmer when the lamps turn on.
A bench near flowers is my favorite place to rest.

time_lines.morning: Good morning! The lamps just went off.
time_lines.evening: The lanterns look so cozy at dusk.
time_lines.night: I should be in bed, hehe.
